Has merge conflicts preventing auto-merge

Recent PR (15.5 hours old) with active development

prs_analyzed.title: feat: distributed hive mind with DHT sharding + improved eval recall (51.2% → ≥83.9%)
prs_analyzed.author: rysweet
key_observations: Massive PR: 148 files changed, 21K additions, 6K deletions, 70 commits
Complex distributed system changes (hive mind + DHT sharding)
4+ days old with ongoing updates
High risk due to scale and architectural impact
Fixes critical Kuzu DB silent failure issue
prs_analyzed.reasoning: Extreme risk level due to size and complexity. Should be decomposed into smaller, reviewable PRs: (1) Kuzu DB fix, (2) DHT sharding, (3) Eval improvements.

prs_analyzed.title: feat: Fleet Orchestration — autonomous multi-VM coding agent management
prs_analyzed.author: rysweet
key_observations: Extremely large PR: 129 files, 30K additions, 162 commits
Complex fleet orchestration system for multi-VM management
Nearly 8 days old - becoming stale
102 comments indicating extensive review activity
High architectural impact
prs_analyzed.reasoning: Massive, stale PR with extreme complexity. Likely needs to be closed and either: (1) rebased with conflict resolution, or (2) decomposed into focused PRs for gradual integration.

critical_issues.issue: 75% of agent PRs have merge conflicts
critical_issues.impact: Blocks automated merging and requires manual intervention
critical_issues.recommendation: Prioritize conflict resolution workflow or automated rebase strategy

critical_issues.issue: 50% of PRs are extremely large (>100 files, >20K additions)
critical_issues.impact: Unreviewable scope increases risk and slows review process
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement PR size limits and decomposition strategy for agent-created PRs

critical_issues.issue: No CI checks configured (total_count: 0 for all PRs)
critical_issues.impact: Cannot verify automated testing or quality gates
critical_issues.recommendation: Configure CI/CD pipelines for automated validation

critical_issues.issue: Average PR age is 3.4 days with oldest at 7.8 days
critical_issues.impact: Long-lived branches accumulate more conflicts and become harder to merge
critical_issues.recommendation: Establish SLA for agent PR review and merge decisions

next_actions.rationale: Only mergeable PR without conflicts, well-tested, ready for integration
Recent PR with manageable scope, high value for recipe runner integration
Extreme complexity requires focused review chunks; split into: Kuzu fix, DHT, eval
Too stale and massive to salvage; needs fresh approach with incremental PRs
